## [00:00 - 03:00]

Okay, one of the hacks that you can use to try and find more targeting ideas for your cold audience, so your top of funnel stuff, is to use the audience insights tool. So I'm in business manager now and I've clicked on the hamburger and you'll see here audience insights under plan. So let's click on that. And when you land on here, it's going to ask you to choose an audience. So everyone on Facebook, people connected to your page, a custom audience. Now what we're going to do here is select people connected to the page. A note here is that this hack will only work if you have enough people inside of an audience. So we've used the cat howl page here and you can also create exclusions and what you'll see is it's going to show you the insights. Now this looks good. I mean nothing new. This is the stuff you could have seen under your page insights. But where it gets really good is when you click on page likes. So click on this and then all of a sudden what you're going to see is pages that share very similar audiences as yours. So these are all interest targetings that you could use for top of funnel cold audiences. Use this with discretion because some of this is going to be totally irrelevant. For example, food network group on. I mean these guys have so many page likes and people connected with them that you're going to be targeting a lot of non specific audience people. So obviously use some common sense here and make sure it's still relevant to your page. And likewise some of these will not show up as interest targeting if they themselves don't have enough of an audience size. Obviously that's around 50,000 to show up as an interest. So having competitors or influencers show up. But even then it's not the most sort of robust fail proof type of hack. So you can use pages. You can also use custom audiences. So if we go under here and you'll see here these are website visitors. These are the interest very similar to the page likes. And if you don't have custom audiences or that many page likes to use this tool you can actually just use an interest. So if you know for example Gary Vaynerchuk has a lot of your target audience in there. What you'll see here is other pages that share this audience as well. Another way to do this hack is to actually go to the page. So for example we're on Gary Vaynerchuk's page here and simply click like. What you'll see is Facebook will drop down. Boom. And it's going to show you other pages that share similar interest.

## [03:00 - 03:49]

So Tim Ferriss, Grant Cardone, Ty Lopez. So if I know that Gary Vaynerchuk is an interest or is a page that my target audience is connected with and I need more ideas for targeting so I need to make the audience bigger or I want to split test different audiences. What I can do is use this hack to find different interest targeting. So for example Ty Lopez we might want to try him out in his own ad set and see how that goes. We could even try him out with Gary Vaynerchuk as well depending on our budgets and what we're trying to achieve. Now this is a rabbit hole right.
